title: v1.3-evolve ICC smoke evidence and release-gate repair
goal: ICC readiness for eshkol_lang v1.3-evolve is blocked because the eshkol_smoke runtime criterion lacks passing runtime evidence. Wire the actual smoke command, preserve SICP/R7RS/compiler coverage, and make readiness reflect real release-gate execution.
status_note: DONE locally: scripts/run_v1_3_readiness.sh refreshes smoke traces, passes scripts/icc_traces to ICC, and exits nonzero unless readiness status is ready. Verified v1.3-evolve readiness ready/100. Mesh used for validation: atlas local passes; enki reachable but disk-full, xavier/jack have checkouts but no build, cosbox/old-donkey are stale and require sync/rebuild before remote certification.
acceptance: ICC readiness --repo eshkol_lang --target v1.3-evolve reports runtime evidence for the smoke gate
smoke script exits nonzero on failed SICP/core release checks
v1.3 core lane remains self-contained and does not require qLLM/attention
